sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the outer container frames
# id=9: outer gray frame for top containers, boundary [[18, 36], [18, 48], [24, 48], [24, 36]]
# id=18: outer gray frame for bottom containers, boundary [[35, 21], [35, 27], [47, 27], [47, 21]]
actions = [
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 18, 'col': 36},   # outer frame top
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 21},   # outer frame bottom
]
result = action(actions)
print(f"Result: {result}")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before.segmentation['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}
    
    print("\nChanges:")
    for nid in sorted(set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys()))):
        bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
        an = after_nodes.get(nid)
        if bn is None:
            print(f"  NEW id={nid}, color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}")
        elif an is None:
            print(f"  REMOVED id={nid}, color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}")
        elif bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
            print(f"  CHANGED id={nid}, color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before.segmentation['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}
    
    print("\nChanges:")
    for nid in sorted(set(list(before_nodes.keys()) + list(after_nodes.keys()))):
        bn = before_nodes.get(nid)

            print(f"  NEW id={nid}, color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}")
        elif an is None:
            print(f"  REMOVED id={nid}, color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}")
        elif bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
            print(f"  CHANGED id={nid}, color={bn['color']}, pixels={bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}")
